description: client A commit-ack → client B Realtime broadcast + /view refetch parsed (revision ≥ committed)
transport: Supabase Realtime broadcast (room:<CODE>, event sync) + HTTP /view refetch
notes: Captured against production. Client B subscribed OK: true. Excludes the 80ms store refresh-debounce (measured single-commit, not bursty). 8s per-sample timeout; timeouts counted, excluded from percentiles.
